jsonLd.title: NABARD is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at NABARD are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NABARD:
NABARD is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NABARD!
